creator: svysh@cryptocom.ru
text:
A notice from maintainer:

Let me warn that CPAN tests for ver.0.09 fail at least at
Freebsd 5.4-release (i386-freebsd-thread-multi-64int):

http://www.nntp.perl.org/group/perl.cpan.testers/361969

It fails in test-related part, which is not addressed during 
normal "make install" procedure for a FreeBSD port. Thus this
problem is not visible to FreeBSD port testing tools.

My personal experience shows, that ver. 0.09 is not portable 
among different versions of Perl. While the main idea of this 
module is to provide exactly portable mechanism for all 
versions of Perl.

Therefore I suggest to wait until the author of the module 
resolves the issue.
